steps.title: Write f(x) in factored form
steps.content: Because the graph passes through $(8,0)$ and $(-3,0)$, the roots are $x=8$ and $x=-3$. So $$f(x)=a(x-8)(x+3).$$

steps.title: Expand to find b in terms of a
Test integer values a > 1
steps.content:
Since $a$ is an integer with $a\gt1$, $a+b=-4a$ takes values $-8,-12,-16,\ldots$ Only $-8$ (when $a=2$) appears among the choices.
  • $-8$: matches $a=2$ - possible.
  • $-4$: would need $a=1$, but $a\gt1$ - impossible.
  • $5$: $-4a=5$ gives non-integer $a$ - impossible.
  • $5.5$: $-4a=5.5$ gives non-integer $a$ - impossible.
That confirms A is correct.
